data.title: BTC fell below 112,000 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 7.69%.
data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC has fallen below 112,000 USDT, currently trading at 111,989.5 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 7.69%. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Gate has launched YBU perpetual contract trading
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate has launched YBU perpetual contract trading (USDT settlement), supporting 1-10x leverage.

data.title: Two hacker addresses panic-sell ETH, losing $3.7 million
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, two hacker addresses sold 5,480 ETH worth $20.47 million, which they had previously purchased at a low price, during the market panic. Their previous purchase price was $3,735, resulting in a loss of $3.7 million.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Prices of most high-quality altcoins will not return to liquidation lows in the short term
data.description: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes posted on the X platform that market rumors suggest that automated liquidations of collateral associated with cross-margin positions on large centralized exchanges (CEXs) are responsible for the price plunges of many altcoins during this sell-off. The prices of many high-quality altcoins will not return to those low levels in the short term.

data.title: Crypto KOL Dachengzi: WBETH, BNSOL and other contract margins should not be read into spot trading pair prices, and the stampede decline could have been avoided
data.description: According to a post by crypto influencer Dachengzi in the community, he previously raised the issue of WBETH risk control during a Binance Square options livestream. His main point was: since Binance already allows WBETH and BNSOL to be used as contract margin, there's no need to use price indices from spot trading pairs; the exchange rate could simply be fixed at 1:1. The reasoning is simple—both assets are inherently Binance ecosystem assets, allowing Binance to mint and burn them. If any issues arise, a simple redemption cycle is all that's needed to mitigate the risk. Last night's "stampede-like" decline could have been completely avoided.

data.title: BTC fell below 113,000 USDT, down 6.62% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC has fallen below 113,000 USDT, currently trading at 112,984 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 6.62%. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance)

data.title: Zerobase founder: Flash withdrawal is different from regular withdrawal, the latter requires 7 days to redeem
data.description: Zerobase founder Mirror Tang stated during a livestream on X Platform Space that the flash withdrawal event will not affect the previously scheduled 7-day redemption period. Furthermore, he stated that funds will continue to be added to the liquidity pool and reminded users to refrain from using the standard withdrawal function if they wish to withdraw funds, as these withdrawals require a 7-day redemption period.

data.title: B3, a consumer ecosystem, announced the launch of the ANY token airdrop program for its payment product Anyspend.
data.description: B3, the open consumer network on the Base chain, has officially announced that its Anyspend token, ANY, will be launched on October 11, 2025, and will be airdropped to early adopters. Five percent of the total airdropped tokens will be used as community rewards. Anyspend is a B3 payment product designed to facilitate easy on-chain and cross-chain transactions. B3 officials stated that 90% of Anyspend (ANY) tokens will be used for the community airdrop. The second quarter airdrop has also begun.

data.title: 7 Siblings borrowed $40 million from Aave to buy the bottom of ETH and has bought $5 million of ETH
data.description: According to on-chain data analyst Ember, 7 Siblings, an institution that has repeatedly bought ETH at the bottom after major price drops, has once again begun buying ETH at the bottom after today's plunge. They borrowed 40 million USDC from Aave and have spent 5 million USDC in the past hour to buy 1,326 ETH at $3,771. The institution has previously made substantial profits by buying ETH at the bottom after major price drops: on August 5th of last year, when ETH fell 15%, they bought 100,000 ETH at approximately $2,270; on April 7th of this year, when ETH fell 10%, they bought 25,000 ETH at approximately $1,700.

data.title: Venus: We are reviewing the WBETH de-anchoring and liquidation issue and will fairly evaluate the subsequent processing steps
data.description: Venus, a lending protocol within the BSC ecosystem, has officially announced that the team is aware of the WBETH price depegging issue, which resulted in some users being unexpectedly liquidated during this morning's price drop. The team is actively investigating the incident, reviewing affected accounts, and evaluating fair next steps. Meanwhile, officials are strengthening risk management and oracle protection measures to help prevent similar incidents in the future. WBETH reportedly depegged during this morning's extreme price drop, falling to as low as $430 (ETH to $3435). The WBETH/ETH exchange rate plummeted to 0.2 and is currently trading at 1.06. The WBETH price is currently trading at $4097 (ETH to $3840).

data.title: Hakimi's market capitalization has rebounded to over $40 million, with the price currently at 0.0448 USDT.
data.description: GMGN data shows that the market capitalization of Hakimi, a BSC ecosystem meme coin, has rebounded above $40 million, with its price currently reported at 0.0448 USDT, a one-hour increase of over 33%. Odaily reminds users that meme coins are subject to significant price fluctuations and advises investors to exercise caution.

data.title: Circle Mints 250 Million USDC on Solana Network
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Whale Alert has reported that Circle minted 250 million USDC on the Solana network at 11:19 AM UTC+8.

data.title: The whale who opened a short position 3 days in advance and made a profit of $200 million is suspected to be Bitforex co-founder Garrett Jin
data.description: Community speculation suggests that the whale who opened a massive short position on Hyperliquid three days in advance, profiting $200 million, is likely Bitforex co-founder Garrett Jin. This is because the whale's address has been previously linked to Garrett Jin. Last month, an address that directly received ETH gas from the whale sent him 40,000 USDT. Garrett Jin is also the largest holder of a bet on Polymarket's "Will Trump pardon CZ in 2025?" Trump's tariff war signals reportedly caused a sharp short-term setback in the crypto market today. However, this Bitcoin OG whale opened a massive short position three days in advance, depositing 3,000 BTC into Hyperliquid on October 7th and going short. He then continued to increase his short position through October 10th, with his BTC short position valued at $752 million and his ETH short position valued at $353 million. Ultimately, the whale's single-day profit on Hyperliquid was approximately $190 million to $200 million. Related reading: "The Whale's Bayonet Fight Behind the Biggest Liquidation Day in Crypto History: Air Force Drinks, Draws Swords, and Departs"

data.title: Suspected Hacker Wallets Sell Ethereum at Significant Loss
data.description: According to PANews, two wallets suspected to be linked to hackers have sold 5,480 ETH following a market downturn, with the total transaction amounting to approximately $20.47 million. These Ethereum tokens were purchased a week earlier at an average price of $3,735 each. The recent sale resulted in an estimated loss of around $3.7 million.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Comments on Altcoin Market Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Arthur Hayes recently shared on social media that rumors suggest the automatic liquidation of cross-margin positions by major centralized exchanges is a primary factor behind the significant decline in altcoin prices during the latest downturn. He congratulated traders who placed buy orders at lower levels, noting that many quality altcoins are unlikely to return to those low prices in the short term.

data.title: A certain address suffered a $3.44 million liquidation of vBNB and vUSDT, and had previously suffered a $13 million phishing loss.
data.description: According to Paidun monitoring, address 0x5636 lost $13 million in assets to a phishing attack on Venus in 2008, which was later recovered by the protocol. Recently, this address experienced a liquidation of $3.44 million in vBNB and vUSDT.

data.title: Two whales lost $23.9 million in cbBTC positions on Aave
data.description: According to Pidun monitoring, as BTC plummeted 8.44%, whale 0xddf7 was liquidated on the Aave protocol, losing $14.4 million worth of cbBTC. Another whale, 0xee7c, was liquidated for $9.5 million worth of cbBTC due to a long position on Aave.

data.title: Tether issued an additional 1 billion USDT, with a total of 11 billion USDT minted in the past 30 days
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, Tether minted an additional 1 billion USDT on Ethereum three hours ago. Over the past 30 days, it has minted 11 billion USDT.

data.title: Ethena founder confronts ZKasino founder: Rumors of a potential bankruptcy are pure rumors, beware of scammers who embezzled $30 million
data.description: Regarding the market rumors about the collapse of Ethena’s delta neutral strategy, Guy Young, founder of Ethena Labs, told the founder of ZKasino, “This is a complete lie. Please be careful listening to someone who embezzled $30 million from investors last year and had his assets seized by law enforcement.”

data.title: Aethir launches $45 million DAT buyback program
data.description: According to a post by official co-founder Mark, Aethir's Digital Asset Treasury (DAT) has been listed on the Nasdaq with POAI, and has now officially launched a 45-day, $45 million ATH open market repurchase program.
